tool_args.label: Capital Program Committee Meeting Book - March 23, 2026

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.project_name: 270 Park Avenue/Grand Central Terminal Train Shed Rehabilitation - Sector 2

tool_args.label: SAS Phase 2 - 106th Street Station Contract Award

payload.event_name: Award of Design-Build Contract for 106th Street Station Structural Shells
payload.description: Board approval to award a design-build contract to Skanska Walsh Traylor SAS2-C3 Joint Venture for excavation and construction of structural shells for 106th Street Station for SAS Phase 2, $1,015,340,000

tool_args.label: ATS-B Upgrades and 5G DCS Equipment Contract

payload.event_name: Non-Competitive Procurement for ATS-B Enhancements and 5G DCS Equipment
payload.description: Non-competitive contract award to Siemens Mobility, Inc. for ATS-B upgrades and 5G DCS equipment for 347 R160 and 73 R179 trains, $120,950,000
Anticipated completion date for Sector 2 work on the Grand Central Terminal Train Shed rehabilitation at 270 Park Avenue
OMNY NFPS project reached Substantial Completion in December 2025
C&D achieved record $15.8B in contract commitments in 2025, more than doubling the five-year average
C&D reported $6.7B in completed work in 2025
C&D identified an additional $1.2B in savings over the past year

payload.raw_value_text: reduced per-mile costs by roughly 33 percent
payload.scope: Fulton and Liberty Lines CBTC installation
payload.description: CBTC-centric signaling model reduced per-mile costs by approximately 33% compared with legacy methods, saving approximately $570M across two major CBTC contracts

payload.raw_value_text: The project budget and EAC for OMNY is $661M
The overall project remains on budget at $772 million

payload.claim_text: Approximately $5 billion of these commitments were supported by Congestion Pricing revenues
payload.description: Congestion Pricing revenues supported ~$5B of the $15.8B in 2025 commitments

payload.claim_text: improvements aimed at reducing the 'Jamaica crawl' affecting LIRR operations through Jamaica Station will be finished this year
payload.description: Significant projects to be finished in 2026 include improvements to reduce the Jamaica crawl

payload.claim_text: C&D is introducing 'line-based bundling' which will group multiple types of state-of-good-repair work into coordinated packages along specific line segments
payload.description: New initiative to maximize efficiency by consolidating work into scheduled service outages

payload.claim_text: The Grand Central Circulation Improvements project was completed $46 million under budget
payload.description: Project combining several major improvements was completed under budget

payload.claim_text: MTA has not received reimbursements from the Federal Transit Administration for approximately seven months despite having a formal funding agreement in place
payload.description: FTA has not paid ~$60M in submitted invoices for SAS Phase 2; MTA sent formal legal letter

payload.claim_text: OMNY contract was awarded to Cubic Transportation Systems in November 2017
payload.description: Design/Build contract award date

payload.claim_text: OMNY system processing close to 6 million taps on a given day, with an overall adoption rate of over 98% for all trips taken throughout the system
payload.description: OMNY adoption metrics

tool_args.label: Private Contributions for Grand Central Train Shed

payload.claim_text: Private contributions totaling $75 million will support work on a major segment of the Park Avenue train shed project
payload.description: Partnership with JPMorgan Chase, Vornado, Rudin family, and City of New York

payload.claim_text: Each of the three casino license recipients has pledged $500 million, providing an important component of the agency's operating budget solution
payload.description: Casino license commitments of $500M each from three recipients

tool_args.label: SAS Phase 2 - 106th Street Station Contract Award

payload.description: Siemens Mobility, Inc. awarded non-competitive contract for ATS-B upgrades and 5G DCS equipment

payload.description: JPMorgan Chase contributes $50M and manages rehabilitation work on Grand Central Terminal Train Shed Sector 2
